queries.question: Give me the video player versions that are supported by each streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Video_Players.version  from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: Give me the video player versions that are supported by each streaming service.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , video_players.version from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?version WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_video_players a :Streaming_Services_Video_Players .
  ?video_players a :Video_Players .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasVideo_Players ?video_players .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?video_players p:version ?version .
}

queries.question: What are video players all streaming services have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Video_Players.player_type  from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: For each streaming service, list video players used.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , video_players.player_type from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?player_type WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_video_players a :Streaming_Services_Video_Players .
  ?video_players a :Video_Players .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasVideo_Players ?video_players .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?video_players p:player_type ?player_type .
}

queries.question: For every streaming service, list the corresponding player types and versions.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.service_name , video_players.player_type , video_players.version from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?player_type ?version WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_video_players a :Streaming_Services_Video_Players .
  ?video_players a :Video_Players .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasVideo_Players ?video_players .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_video_players p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?video_players p:player_type ?player_type .
  ?video_players p:version ?version .
}

queries.question: Provide me with the player type and version that is common for all streaming services.
queries.sql: SELECT Video_Players.player_type, Video_Players.version  from Streaming_Services_Video_Players join Video_Players on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id = Video_Players.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Video_Players.video_player_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Video_Players.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me video players every streaming service uses.
what player types and versions are associated with each streaming service?
Give me the video player versions that are supported by each streaming service.
